reasoning: The control 8.3.3 focuses on the procedures for modifying authentication factors, such as enabling multi-factor authentication (MFA) for cloud console access. Kubernetes does not natively manage user authentication in the same way as cloud IAM systems. Instead, Kubernetes relies on external identity providers for user authentication, often using mechanisms like OIDC or LDAP. Therefore, MFA enforcement is typically handled outside of Kubernetes, at the identity provider level. Kubernetes RBAC is used for authorization, not authentication, making this control not directly applicable to Kubernetes.
title: Examine procedures for modifying authentication factors and observe security personnel to verify ...
